meta.title: Marketing and the information age
meta.sourceDoc: 77. P3 - Marketing and the information age 信息时代营销.pdf
meta.matchedTitle: Marketing and the information age 信息时代营销

passageNotes.label: Source
passageNotes.text: Explanations were extracted from the answer-analysis table in the source PDF by OCR. Minor OCR mistakes may remain; the official answer key is used for the answer field.

questionSections.text:
题目 27
答案：F
PDF 定位："Running out of information is nota problem,but drowning in it is."以及"bombarded with onemilliontoonebillionnewnumbers eachweek"（第F段）
PDF 解析：明确说明信息量过多以致难以应付。

题目 28
答案：A
PDF 定位："customersmust see value in returning continually to the stores..."(第A段)
PDF 解析：讲"长期价值、反复回购"。 即重复业务 的重要性。

题目 29
答案：B
PDF 定位："Channel [V] encourages its viewers to sign up for text messages and email alerts.." (第B段)
PDF 解析：这是典型的个性化/定向触达示例。

题目 30
答案：H
PDF 定位：利益-成本例子：...profit $500,000...foolish to spend$30,000 for additional information that would increase the profit to only$525,000."（第H段）
PDF 解析：说明在新增调研不划算时，不宜再委托获 取信息。

题目 31
答案：D
PDF 定位："As household incomes increase, choice widens and buyers become better at discriminating.."（第D段）
PDF 解析：收入增加→可选择的产品更广。

questionSections.text:
题目 32
答案：NO
PDF 定位："While some of the information... gathered by government bodies.., most of it is purposefully gathered by marketing organisations."（第C段）
PDF 解析：文中说大多数信息由营销组织收集，非政府机构。与题干"多数由 政府收集"相反。

题目 33
答案：NOT GIVEN
PDF 定位："Australia,New Zealand and Singapore are moving from industrial to information-based economies."（第E段)
PDF 解析：只说这些国家在转型，未比较新西兰与澳大利亚谁更快。

题目 34
答案：YES
PDF 定位："subordinates may withhold information they believe will reflect badly on theirperformance."（第F段）
PDF 解析：明确说员工会隐满不利信息。

题目 35
答案：YES
PDF 定位："Although marketing organisations have greater capacity to provide managers with information, they often do not use it well."（第F段）
PDF 解析：指出管理者经常未能善用信息。

题目 36
答案：YES
PDF 定位：*By itself, information is valueless its value comes from its use."（第H段）
PDF 解析：只有被使用信息才有价值。

questionSections.text:
题目 37
答案：marketing managers
PDF 定位："The MIS begins and ends with marketing managers." (第G段)
PDF 解析：流程起点为"营销经理"。

题目 38
答案：information needs
PDF 定位："it interacts with these managers to assess the information needs they have."（第G段）
PDF 解析：找出他们的"信息需求"。

题目 39
答案：internal records
PDF 定位："Next, it develops the needed information from internal records, marketing intelligence activities and the research process."（第G段）
PDF 解析：三个来源之一；对应"Developedthrough：..."。

题目 40
答案：analysis unit
PDF 定位："The analysis unit processes the data to make it more useful..."（第G段）
PDF 解析：数据由"分析单元"处理。
